Design, Synthesis and Biological Evaluation Letters in Drug Design & Discovery, 2015, Vol. 12, No. 1 43 Calcd. for C H F N : C, 69.81; H, 5.86; N, 12.06. Found: plates were incubated at 27 °C for 48 h. Inhibition zones 27 27 3 4 C, 69.78; H, 5.82; N, 12.02. were measured, the diameter was calculated in millimeter and the corresponding results were in Table 2. 2-(2-(1-(6-Phenyl-4-(trifluoromethyl) Pyridin-2-yl) Piperi- din-4-yl)-1H-benzo[d] imidazol-1-yl) Acetonitrile (5c) 4. CONCLUSION Yield: 83 %. M.P: 174-176 oC, I.R: 1610.87 (-C=N-), In conclusion, we have discovered that a number of ben- 1396.06 (CF 3 ). 1H NMR (DMSO-d 6 ): (cid:2) 2.18-2.27 (m, 4H), zimidazole-pyridine-piperidine hybrids displayed moderate 3.23-3.37 (m, 2H), 3.49-3.62 (m, 1H), 4.71-4.80 (d, 2H, J = activity against various fungal organisms as well as bacterial 11.51 Hz), 5.59 (s, 2H, N-CH 2 -CN), 6.97 (s, 1H, Ar-H), organisms. One promising compound 5a exhibited broad 7.27-7.30 (m, 2H, Ar-H), 7.41-7.49 (m, 3H, Ar-H), 7.57-7.61 spectrum antifungal activity including antibacterial activity (m, 1H, Ar-H), 7.65-7.69 (m, 1H, Ar-H), 8.08-8.10 (m, 2H, in vitro and was more potent than the standard drugs. Ar-H). ESI-M...
